response.original_title: THREE GIRLS IN A BOUT - And on the Norfolk Broads, too, that Mecca of the Water-loving sportswomen
response.overview: L/S's of three young ladies washing themselves on the top of a yacht on a river. L/S of the women walking down ramp from the boat. L/S of the women washing the boat and splashing each other with mops, they appear to be having a very good time. L/S and M/S of the girls on the deck of the yacht hoisting up the sale.
response.title: THREE GIRLS IN A BOUT - And on the Norfolk Broads, too, that Mecca of the Water-loving sportswomen
